caption: An ultrasound machine monitor displays a grayscale medical image of a body part containing several dark, circular fluid-filled areas. The screen includes technical data in the upper right and left corners, such as the date and time "2023Feb14 09:41", "Gen S", and "MB", as well as measurement labels like "TIS 0.1". At the bottom of the screen, a menu bar contains options such as "Gen", "Guide", and "MB On". The monitor is housed in a gray plastic casing. Overlaid on each view is a purple silhouette of a person walking with a cane, accompanied by the text "Day 2" in a white bubble and "Sim Week" next to a small building icon. The scene remains static across the sequence, with no changes in the image on the monitor or the surrounding environment.
